hero.titlePart2: Ambassador of Baghdadi Taste in Bahrain
hero.waMessage: Hello, I'd like to get in touch...
hero.visualAlt: Cinematic presentation of authentic Iraqi Masgouf and Charcoal Grills at Kahramana Baghdad Bahrain

authentic.q: Where can I find an authentic Iraqi restaurant in Bahrain?
authentic.a: Kahramana Baghdad offers an authentic Iraqi dining experience in Bahrain, featuring traditional Iraqi grills, heritage dishes, oriental appetizers, and family-friendly hospitality.

grills.q: What makes the Iraqi grills at Kahramana Baghdad unique?
grills.a: Kahramana Baghdad's grills are distinguished by rich Iraqi marinades and careful preparation focused on flavor and texture, with options including Iraqi kebab, tikka, shish tawook, and mixed grill platters for individuals and families.

masgouf.q: Is Iraqi Masgouf fish available at Kahramana Baghdad?
masgouf.a: Yes, Iraqi Masgouf is available at Kahramana Baghdad. We recommend contacting the branch before your visit to confirm availability or for advance booking, especially during peak hours.

families.q: Is Kahramana Baghdad suitable for families and private gatherings?
families.a: Yes, Kahramana Baghdad is family-friendly and offers private seating and cabins for a more comfortable and personal experience, especially when booked in advance.

delivery.q: Can I order delivery from Kahramana Baghdad?
delivery.a: Yes, delivery is available depending on the branch and area. You can order Iraqi dishes and grills through available ordering channels or by contacting your nearest branch.

events.q: Do you offer banquets or buffets for events and gatherings?
events.a: Yes, Kahramana Baghdad offers options for banquets, private gatherings, and special occasions, with the ability to coordinate a customized Iraqi menu including grills and dishes suited to your guest count and occasion type.

locations.q: Where are Kahramana Baghdad branches located in Bahrain?
locations.a: Kahramana Baghdad has branches in Riffa and Qallali. Full details for each branch — including Google Maps location, opening hours, and contact methods — are available on the branches page.

vault.title: Archive of Authenticity
vault.desc: Every dish is a historical document preserved with care and served with passion.

telemetry.title: Live Quality Check
telemetry.desc: Live tracking of preparation, cooking, and presentation standards for absolute consistency.

philosophy.standard: In a world of fast food and compromises...
philosophy.kahramana: ...we hold onto the origin, to build a legacy that never fades.

hero.title: From Mesopotamia to the Pearl of the Gulf
hero.desc: A journey of flavors, heritage, and the passion to bring authentic Iraqi cuisine to the world.

founder.title: Eng. Asaad Al-Jubouri
founder.p1: Engineer Asaad Al-Jubouri carries a deep passion for detail — the same passion that accompanied him from the world of engineering to the world of taste. For him, food was never merely a business — it was a sincere act of transporting the culture and generosity of Baghdad to Bahrain.
founder.p2: With the mindset of an engineer who believes that quality is built, not encountered by chance, he designed 'Kahramana Baghdad' to be more than just a restaurant: a space where Iraqi authenticity meets modern taste and refined Bahraini hospitality.
founder.p3: Today, Al-Jubouri stands behind every detail presented to the guest — from the selection of ingredients to the style of presentation — ensuring that every visit is a true reflection of his passion, vision, and respect for his guests' taste.
founder.quote: I didn't just build a restaurant; I transported the flavor of Baghdad to Bahrain.

narrative.title: Roots That Run Deep
narrative.p1: Kahramana Baghdad was born from a deep love for Iraqi culinary heritage — the smoky masgouf grilled by the Tigris, the slow-roasted quzi served at family celebrations, and the humble timan that anchors every Iraqi meal.
narrative.p2: When we opened our doors in Bahrain, our mission was clear: to offer an authentic taste of Baghdad without compromise. No shortcuts. No substitutions. Just the real thing.
narrative.p3: Today, with two branches and a growing family of loyal guests, we continue that promise every single day.

m1.title: The Beginning
m1.desc: Kahramana Baghdad opens its first branch in Riffa, introducing authentic Iraqi cuisine to Bahrain.

m2.title: Growing Family
m2.desc: Our second branch opens in Qallali, Muharraq, bringing the flavors of Baghdad closer to more communities.

m3.title: Digital Evolution
m3.desc: Launching our digital platform to make ordering easier while preserving the authentic Kahramana experience.

philosophy.title: More Than a Meal
philosophy.desc: We believe food is memory, culture, and connection. Every dish we serve is a piece of Baghdad's soul, prepared with the same care as if you were a guest in our home.

step1.title: Authenticity
step1.desc: We never compromise on recipes. Every dish follows the original Baghdadi method, no substitutions.

step2.title: Freshness
step2.desc: Ingredients are sourced daily. If it's not fresh, it's not served.

step3.title: Craft
step3.desc: Our chefs train for years to master the techniques that make Iraqi cuisine unique.

step4.title: Hospitality
step4.desc: Every guest is welcomed as family — with warmth, respect, and genuine care.

v1.title: Authenticity
v1.desc: True to Baghdad's culinary heritage in every dish.

v2.title: Quality
v2.desc: Uncompromising standards from ingredient to plate.

v3.title: Innovation
v3.desc: Honoring tradition while embracing modern hospitality.

v4.title: Heart
v4.desc: Cooking with passion, serving with love.

v5.title: Community
v5.desc: Building connections one shared meal at a time.

v6.title: Legacy
v6.desc: Preserving Iraqi culinary heritage for generations to come.

branches.title: Find Us
branches.desc: Two branches in Bahrain, one authentic experience.

cta.title: Ready to Experience Baghdad?
cta.desc: Visit us at either of our branches or order online via WhatsApp.

engineeringOfHeritage.title: The Engineering of Heritage
engineeringOfHeritage.intro: At Kahramana Baghdad, the experience is not shaped by food alone. It is built from Baghdad’s memory, generosity, and unforgettable details.
engineeringOfHeritage.paragraph: Every line in the emblem, every ornament on the vessel, and every golden detail in the identity carries meaning. It is the story of Iraqi hospitality transformed into design, and heritage turned into an experience.

face.label: The Face of Welcome
face.description: A calm expression that reflects the grace of Baghdadi hospitality — a presence that does not need to be loud to be remembered.

vessel.label: The Vessel of Generosity
vessel.description: The vessel is more than an ornament. It is a symbol of giving, hospitality, and welcoming every guest with dignity.

hands.label: The Gesture of Care
hands.description: The hands represent the heart of the experience: food offered with care, not as a passing meal, but as a gesture of respect.

ornament.label: The Ornament of Memory
ornament.description: Inspired by the spirit of Mesopotamia, the ornaments connect the present to the past and give the identity a depth beyond decoration.

frame.label: The Frame of the Story
frame.description: The oval frame holds the story in balance, as if heritage itself is preserved with care and presented with quiet confidence.

conceptToTable.title: From Concept to Table
conceptToTable.paragraph: Just as the emblem begins with measured lines and becomes a clear identity, our experience begins with detail: the choice of ingredients, respect for the recipe, the way food is served, and the feeling that remains after the final bite.
conceptToTable.shortStatement: We do not only prepare the meal. We design the experience before it reaches the table.

closing.title: Kahramana Baghdad
closing.line: Iraqi hospitality, composed with the spirit of Baghdad.
closing.lamassuDescription: A detail inspired by Mesopotamian heritage, appearing as a quiet mark of the story’s depth.

altTexts.blueprint: A luxury engineering blueprint of the Kahramana Baghdad emblem, reflecting Iraqi heritage and Baghdadi hospitality
altTexts.reality: Details from the Kahramana Baghdad experience, where Iraqi heritage meets refined hospitality
